creator: christer.solskogen@gmail.com
text:
When using java/openjdk7 www/tomcat7's rc.d script wont shutdown tomcat (but it will start it)
the same applies to www/tomcat6

Fix: 

not known
How-To-Repeat: Install java/openjdk7 and www/tomcat{6,7} - add tomcat7_enable="yes" to /etc/rc.conf
run /usr/local/etc/rc.d/tomcat7 start - wait a minute - and run /usr/local/etc/tomcat7 stop
it will say "tomcat7 not running? (check /var/run/tomcat7.pid)." - staring it will also fail since its running.
jps -l will confirm.
